today.source: git-derived: distinct deliverable paths committed to E:\hitthe.link on 2026-06-18 (excludes index/heartbeat/skip-ci noise)
today.note: Day in progress — count is what has shipped so far, not a full-day total.

derivation: Per-day 'count' = distinct top-level deliverable paths committed to the hitthe.link repo that day, excluding auto-index/heartbeat/skip-ci noise commits per canon-autoship-floor-48-day. This is the conservative real ship unit (one deliverable, not one file/asset commit). A companion job re-derives this from git and overwrites today.count + asOf; the widget reads this file only and never fabricates — if today is missing it falls back to lastKnown with its date.
companion: Update via: count distinct deliverable paths from `git log` for the day, write today.{date,count}, asOf, lastKnown, and append/replace the recent[] entry. Never write a number not derivable from git.
